error_signature: error when attempting to create the record
title: Error creating Airtable record with attachment
symptom: When trying to create a record in Airtable with a mapped attachment field, an error occurs due to incorrect data structure.
applies_when: Using Drag and Drop element to upload files
Mapping URLs to Airtable attachment field
not_this_if: The attachment field is correctly formatted
No error occurs during record creation
root_cause: The Drag and Drop module generates an array of objects with more key/value pairs than Airtable allows for attachments. Airtable requires a specific structure with only 'url' and 'filename' keys for each attachment.
fix_steps: Create a secondary variable to transform the array of objects to only include 'url' and 'filename' keys.
Use a For Loop to iterate through the transformed array and create the correct structure for Airtable.
Map the newly created array to the attachment field in Airtable.
agent_instruction: Transform the uploaded file data to match Airtable's required structure and map it to the attachment field.
